text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo and I are on our way home after going
out.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait a moment, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That poster over there is for a movie I've wanted
to see for a while...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I didn't even realize it was already showing. I'll
have to go see it soon.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wait a minute! It says today is the final day!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of all the rotten luck! If I had known, I would've
suggested going to see it today!
choice_data_list: Do you want to go see it now?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Right now?! ...Well, if we go right now, we can
catch the final screening!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but we can't! If we watch it now, we'll miss
curfew!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm first-rate, after all! Breaking curfew is such
second-rate behavior!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But it would also be second-rate to let my last
chance to watch the movie slip by...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ughhh! The truly first-rate choice must be...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that was so fun! ♪ Watching it was the
correct choice after all!
choice_data_list: We aren't going to make curfew...
We aren't going to make curfew...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What are you saying?! Are you giving up just like
that?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I may have chosen to watch the movie, but that
doesn't mean I chose not to obey curfew!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The phrase "give up" isn't even in my vocabulary! I will abide by the curfew!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer, now's your chance to shine! I
give you permission to come up with a brilliant
plan!
choice_data_list: You want me to figure it out?!
You want me to figure it out?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As my trainer, you must be prepared to do
whatever it takes! There's no time to
waste—think!
choice_data_list: Let's sneak into the dorm without being seen.
Let's find a valid reason for being late.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sneak in? I wonder if that's possible...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
While you distract the dorm leader, I could tiptoe
past...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's not a bad plan, but there's no room for error!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After making sure King Halo is well hidden in the
bushes, I call out to the dorm leader.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, if it isn't King's trainer. What can I do for
you?
choice_data_list: Pretty nice weather we're having, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The weather? Well, now that you mention it, the
clear night sky is rather beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Did you hear something coming from the
bushes just now?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Meow... Meow!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah, it was merely a cute little kitten.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe, you've certainly got your work cut out for
you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
She's accompanied by a guardian, so I'll turn a
blind eye this time. But could you be a bit more
careful from now on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her benevolent dorm leader, King Halo
avoids becoming second-rate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: A valid reason? Like what?
choice_data_list: That's what we're going to figure out right now.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey! Don't tell me you don't have any ideas!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The longer we think, the later I'll be! I'm heading
to the academy!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Even if I ran faster than a bullet train, I wouldn't make it on time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What will the dorm leader have to say about a
first-rate student like me breaking curfew...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What will I have to say about what, now?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! Fuji! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Have you come to detain me for committing an
act unbecoming of a first-rate student?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I merely came out to procure essential dorm
supplies.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And, by some divine providence, I've stumbled
upon the two of you! Would you be willing to
help me with the shopping?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to have a lot to bring back, and I could
certainly use a hand.
choice_data_list: That sounds like a valid reason to me.
That sounds like a valid reason to me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: A valid reason? For what?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Right! If the dorm leader asked me for help, it
would be a perfectly justifiable reason for being
late!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: A reason for being late?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah, no, it's nothing! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Feel free to buy as much as you like! I'll happily
help you carry it all!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's heartening to hear. Then I shall gratefully
welcome your assistance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In exchange for lugging around a large quantity
of goods, King Halo avoids punishment for
breaking curfew.
